steps.name: Log In to freelancer staging env.
Verify that the user is logged
Select subcategory: Business coaching voor ondernemers
Select work location: De opdracht hoeft niet op locatie te worden uitgevoerd maar regelmatig face-to-face contact op locatie is vereist
Select city: Kyivske, Sukhoielanetska silska hromada, Mykolaivska Oblast, UKR
Select start date option  "As soon as possible"
Verify that the project in the My projects page contains the same data
Verify that the project name in the My projects page is the same
Verify that the project category in the My projects page is the same
Verify that the project subcategory in the My projects page is the same
Verify that the opened project contains the same data
